979 TRCHOSTM_ADMSN_CD TRCHOSTM_ADMSN_CD O0110E1A Therapies: Tracheostomy Care (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received tracheostomy care days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
